message:
fix: pass agent tree to bus-spawned agents for child auto-discovery

Orchestrator agents like tech-lead have agents:[] but can_spawn:true —
they rely on the agent tree to auto-discover child agents (engineer,
spec-reviewer, etc.). Bus-spawned agents weren't getting the tree,
so getDelegatableAgents() returned empty, causing the zero-tools
safety check to kill them.

Now agent-process.ts scans the root directory to build the tree and
passes agentTree, agentTreeSelfPath, and agentTreeChildren to the
Agent constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
